reason: This video is an educational/research presentation about laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair outcomes, not an FLS task performance. It contains conference presentation slides with study data, hernia type statistics, complication rates, and literature comparisons—not a trainee performing any of the five FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture).

presentation_details.moderators: David Edelman, MD and Robert Fanelli, MD
presentation_details.study_focus: Post-fellowship learning curve for laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair
